details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest 50 mg lung cancer tablet under $2000 to sample cart (qty 2)
Task 2: Open English SDS for Cefrolim Injection
Task 3: Subscribe to monthly cardiology newsletter (HCP, North America)
Task 4: Open 2023 annual report in online viewer
Task 5: Open application form for newest QA job in Germany (last 30 days)
Task 6: Add lower-cost-per-mg Atrolim strength (1 pack) to sample cart
Task 7: Register for diabetes webinar (3-5 PM, >=14 days from today, HCP)
Task 8: Contact recruiting Phase III RA trial in Spain (18-65)
Task 9: Submit sustainability feedback referencing CO2 30% by 2030 target
